ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yearly_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which data is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population within the city for that year */,
  "price_per_m3" TEXT /* Price per cubic meter of water */,
  "annual_rainfall" INTEGER /* Total annual rainfall in millimeters */,
  "water_consumption" INTEGER /* Total annual water consumption in cubic meters */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population per square kilometer */,
  "water_quality_index" TEXT /* A measure of water quality */,
  "emergency_events" INTEGER /* Number of emergency events (e.g., droughts, floods) in the year */,
  "public_engagement_score" TEXT /* A score indicating the level of public engagement in water conservation efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the population data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender */,
  "household_size" TEXT /* Average household size */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the population (e.g., median income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_pricing" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the pricing data */,
  "price_per_m3" TEXT /* Price per cubic meter of water */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for price adjustment */,
  "tiered_pricing" TEXT /* Details of tiered pricing structures */,
  "peak_season_adjustment" TEXT /* Adjustments made during peak water usage seasons */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water (e.g., groundwater, surface water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_records" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the rainfall data */,
  "annual_rainfall" INTEGER /* Total annual rainfall in millimeters */,
  "seasonal_distribution" TEXT /* Seasonal distribution of rainfall */,
  "rainfall_intensity" TEXT /* Average intensity of rainfall */,
  "drought_duration" INTEGER /* Number of days with no rainfall */,
  "flood_events" INTEGER /* Number of flood events in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_consumption" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the consumption data */,
  "total_consumption" INTEGER /* Total annual water consumption in cubic meters */,
  "average_consumption_per_capita" TEXT /* Average water consumption per capita */,
  "residential_consumption" INTEGER /* Water consumption by residential users */,
  "commercial_consumption" INTEGER /* Water consumption by commercial users */,
  "industrial_consumption" INTEGER /* Water consumption by industrial users */,
  "public_consumption" INTEGER /* Water consumption by public utilities (e.g., parks, schools) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_conservation" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation initiative */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the initiative was launched */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation initiative */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "outreach_channels" TEXT /* Channels used for outreach (e.g., social media, TV, flyers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_conservation_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES yearly_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the project was initiated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure project (e.g., reservoir, pipeline) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the project (e.g., increased storage capacity, reduced leaks) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES yearly_data ("year")
)
